"Done.

Spreadsheet: [Top ACL Surgeons NYC](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1j416Ht5bRC_6JSeY_PCO7koSlf-OzxZ207IrAn1Qg4s/edit?gid=0#gid=0)

I verified and listed exactly 10 NYC surgeons whose official hospital or practice profiles mention ACL reconstruction, meniscus repair/surgery, knee ligament reconstruction, or very close sports-knee procedures. I also left each real profile page open in its own browser tab for side-by-side review.

Institution summary added in the sheet:
- Hospital for Special Surgery: 6 of 10
- NYU Langone: 2 of 10
- Mount Sinai: 1 of 10
- ColumbiaDoctors / NewYork-Presbyterian: 1 of 10

The main takeaway: HSS dominates this shortlist, with NYU Langone also showing up strongly."
